ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "pre_settle" REAL /* Previous settlement price */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "settle_price" REAL /* Settlement price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades */,
  "trading_amount" REAL /* Total trading amount */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open interest */,
  "exercise_price" REAL /* Exercise price */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., futures, options) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the instrument belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "mic_code" TEXT /* MIC (Market Identifier Code) code of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "mic_code" TEXT /* MIC (Market Identifier Code) code of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES market_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., uptrend, downtrend) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., percentage change) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume analysis */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analysis */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analysis */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* Type of volume (e.g., total, average) */,
  "volume_value" REAL /* Value of the volume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_analysis_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., price trend, volume analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination system */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., ETL, API call) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, paused) */,
  "last_run_date" TEXT /* Date of the last run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destination_systems ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_systems" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination system */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination system */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of the destination system (e.g., database, API) */,
  "destination_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the destination system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)
